content.speakerText: Thanks, everyone—this was way more insightful than I expected.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢大家，这次讨论比我预期深刻多了。

options.text: Same here! Let’s keep this convo going on the Discord group.
Yeah, good talk. See you later.
I didn’t learn anything, thanks anyway.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体行动（继续在Discord群聊）体现真诚致谢，符合场景要求。选项2虽礼貌但缺乏深度回应；选项3自相矛盾且不礼貌；选项4冷漠且不恰当，不符合礼貌结束的语境。

content.speakerText: I really appreciated our discussion today.
content.speakerTextCn: 我非常感谢今天的讨论。

options.text: Me too! I’ll send you the reading list I mentioned.
Yeah, I guess it was okay.
Bye, I have to go now.

content.explanation: 正确答案通过提供具体行动（发送阅读清单）体现真诚和延续性，符合礼貌结束的高阶表达。选项2和3态度敷衍，缺乏尊重；选项4虽是告别但未回应感谢，显得冷漠。

content.speakerText: This meeting was so helpful—thank you for your time.
content.speakerTextCn: 这次会议非常有帮助，感谢你的时间。

options.text: It was my pleasure. Let’s schedule another chat next week.
You’re welcome. I’m done with this now.
Thanks for saying that. I’m tired.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了礼貌回应（It was my pleasure）并提出未来行动（安排下次聊天），体现专业与真诚。选项2过于随意；选项3虽礼貌但结尾消极；选项4转移焦点到自己感受，不合礼仪。
